title: “Your comments smack of xenophobia!”
summary: Laura Loomer is confronted for her history of racism and Islamophobia on a recent trip to India. Jessica Tarlov responds, on Raging Moderates.
transcript_html:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/W2_X037JNdU

Transcript

racist and Islamophobic and I'm sorry to say that we have devoa in this country where we welcome all but your comment smack of anti-Indianism worse still islamophobia and even worse racism which has no place ma'am in today's world so get real ma'am sorry to say that but that comments are unacceptable to me as an Indian and as a world citizen >> I'm telling you these people they're going to have to live all in Palm Beach County with each other They're not going to be welcome all over the world. Once

he's out of office, once the power dries up, Jared Kushner won't be able to be doing these 5 billion dollar deals anymore. And hopefully they'll be relegated to just one area and they can have their Mara Lago parties and we won't have to see it. I I love what the guy kept saying, "I'm sorry to say it." He wasn't sorry at all. And he shouldn't be sorry for a second. Your tweets are public and they have impact all over the world. And I think it's a very good thing when people get confronted with opinions that are long-held. They weren't just an errant tweet, but something systemic about them. And
